description: Using the dataset at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Viagra.csv, which contains data from a pharmacological study on the effect of Viagra on libido, perform a Multinomial Goodness-of-Fit Test on the 'Dose' variable to check if participants were distributed according to the study protocol. Test the hypothesis of a 50/25/25 split (Placebo: 0.5, Low Dose: 0.25, High Dose: 0.25). Include descriptives and a descriptives plot in the analysis. Save the JASP project to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/MultinomialGOF.jasp.
